About Me

Economics mind,
writer's instinct.

I have a background in economics and am currently completing a Master's in International Economic Policy at Julius-Maximilians-Universität Würzburg. I focus on making complex, technical information accessible and engaging for real users.

My experience spans fintech, blockchain, and healthcare technology — working with cross-functional teams to create structured documentation, UX content, and localization workflows. I care about precision, clarity, and content that genuinely serves its audience.

Based in Bamberg, Bavaria. Open to working student and internship roles in English speaking environments.

Case Study 01

Designing a Conversational Assistant for Hearing Aid Support

Users could not describe their problem and the system was not helping them try. I designed the full conversation architecture — onboarding flows, response variants, edge cases — for an AI-powered hearing support assistant.

Case Study 02

Building a Scalable Content & Documentation System

Fragmented content across a global organisation with no shared source of truth. I designed the information architecture, writing guidelines, and terminology system that became the foundation of a live internal platform.

Information ArchitectureContent StrategyMiroTerminology
Read Case Study →
Brand redacted

Case Study 03

Improving Error Communication in a Hearing Aid App

Users could not tell if the app had failed or was still searching. I redesigned the error messaging using a What happened, Why it happened, What to do framework — turning ambiguity into clarity.

Error StatesUX WritingFigmaCopy Framework

Creative and Visual AI

The On‑the‑Go Collection

Working Student — UX Writer & Content Specialist

Global Hearing Care Brand · Global Marketing · Hybrid

UX writer creating interface copy for digital hearing care products. Migrating company documentation to Tridion CMS using DITA XML and Oxygen XML. Managing translation keys and Phrase-compatible Excel glossaries in Phrase TMS. Designing content layouts in Figma and organising workflows in Miro.
